description_long: This is a modern pump-action shotgun with a matte black finish, featuring a full synthetic stock and a robust, utilitarian design. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the forend is textured for a secure grip. The receiver is compact and streamlined, with a prominent trigger guard that is rounded and slightly elongated. The stock is solid and ergonomically shaped, designed for shoulder firing, and the overall build suggests durability and reliability. The shotgun lacks any visible external magazine or shell holder, maintaining a clean and functional profile. Its appearance is consistent with tactical or law enforcement models commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A matte black pump-action shotgun with a full synthetic stock, long barrel, and textured forend, designed for durability and tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the stock, receiver, trigger guard, forend, and barrel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the full length and features of the shotgun from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, standard barrel length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded and slightly elongated trigger guard, medium size, no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
